title: Small Caps Became Clearer Once I Focused on Structure
author: Admirable_Dark4560
selftext:
This article is not intended for boasting, but merely serves to document a recent trade that was both logically sound and well-executed.

Why have I made progress in this field?

What truly transformed my approach was not some magical indicator, but rather the establishment of a repeatable trading framework.

Achieve robust equity growth through a structured strategy and control drawdowns through rigorous risk management.

My approach involves identifying breakouts above resistance levels, entering on pullbacks within a 1–3% range, setting stop-losses at 5–8%, and continuing to hold the position as long as the target price remains within the 10–20% range.

Summary: Performance is often superior when employing a clearly defined investment strategy. Without an executable structure, decision-making can easily be disrupted by short-term fluctuations, and errors can accumulate gradually.

I wish everyone success in the stock market!
